executives.name: Jagdeep Singh
executives.background: Jagdeep Singh has served as our Chief Development Officer since February 2024. Prior to joining ChargePoint, he was the co-founder and CEO of QuantumScape Corporation from 2010 to 2024. He previously founded and served as CEO of Infinera Corporation.

executives.name: James Dolce
executives.background: Mr. Dolce is the CEO of Lookout, Inc. and has extensive experience in the networking industry.
